description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: From the Android productivity apps, open the details for an app that offers a calendar view, has at least a 4.5-star rating, costs under $4 per month, and then open its Android store download link.
tasks.name: From the Android productivity apps, open the details for an app that offers a calendar view, has at least a 4.5-star rating, costs under $4 per month, and then open its Android store download link.
tasks.description: From the Android productivity apps, open the details for an app that offers a calendar view, has at least a 4.5-star rating, costs under $4 per month, and then open its Android store download link.

tasks.instruction: On the pricing page, choose the lowest-priced monthly plan that supports at least three devices and costs no more than $15 per month, then continue to checkout.
tasks.name: On the pricing page, choose the lowest-priced monthly plan that supports at least three devices and costs no more than $15 per month, then continue to checkout.
tasks.description: On the pricing page, choose the lowest-priced monthly plan that supports at least three devices and costs no more than $15 per month, then continue to checkout.

tasks.instruction: In the help center, open an FAQ article about cancelling an iOS subscription within 7 days and then follow the link provided there to contact support about refunds.

target_names: Cancel your iOS subscription within 7 days

tasks.name: In the help center, open an FAQ article about cancelling an iOS subscription within 7 days and then follow the link provided there to contact support about refunds.
tasks.description: In the help center, open an FAQ article about cancelling an iOS subscription within 7 days and then follow the link provided there to contact support about refunds.

tasks.instruction: From the communication apps, start a free trial for the least expensive app that offers end-to-end encryption, supports both Android (8.0 or later) and iOS (13 or later), and costs under $10 per month.
tasks.name: From the communication apps, start a free trial for the least expensive app that offers end-to-end encryption, supports both Android (8.0 or later) and iOS (13 or later), and costs under $10 per month.
tasks.description: From the communication apps, start a free trial for the least expensive app that offers end-to-end encryption, supports both Android (8.0 or later) and iOS (13 or later), and costs under $10 per month.

tasks.instruction: In the tutorials section, open the newest iOS video guide about syncing a notes app across devices, play the video, and use the option to copy its link.

target_names: Sync NoteMaster across your iPhone and iPad (2025 guide)

tasks.name: In the tutorials section, open the newest iOS video guide about syncing a notes app across devices, play the video, and use the option to copy its link.

tasks.instruction: Use the footer form to subscribe to the newsletter with the email address user@example.com, selecting Canada as the country, weekly frequency, only the Product Updates and Security Alerts topics, and indicating you use both major mobile platforms.
tasks.name: Use the footer form to subscribe to the newsletter with the email address user@example.com, selecting Canada as the country, weekly frequency, only the Product Updates and Security Alerts topics, and indicating you use both major mobile platforms.

tasks.instruction: Submit a high-priority billing support request for an Android task management app, including a 2–3 sentence description that contains the phrase "double-charged for my monthly subscription" and a contact email address.
tasks.name: Submit a high-priority billing support request for an Android task management app, including a 2–3 sentence description that contains the phrase "double-charged for my monthly subscription" and a contact email address.

tasks.instruction: From the apps catalog, select the two lowest-priced apps that offer both offline access and cloud sync with monthly prices under $8, and open their comparison view.
tasks.name: From the apps catalog, select the two lowest-priced apps that offer both offline access and cloud sync with monthly prices under $8, and open their comparison view.

tasks.instruction: With pricing shown in euros, open the Buy Now page for a photo & video app that is a one-time purchase, supports iPad, costs at most €25, and has a rating of at least 4 stars.
